commands.review_summary:
The branch updates Codex app-server tool-progress projection and auto-reply dispatch so Telegram direct message-tool-only `/verbose` turns receive concise tool summaries while generic `Working:` and message/activity-log noise are suppressed.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current `message_tool_only` suppression can drop verbose tool summaries, and the linked source PR describes a live Telegram DM before/after path; I did not rerun that live path during this read-only review.
